skills.name: Pressure Russia North
skills.summary: game=diplomacy | skill=Pressure Russia North | effects=attack_completed | context=use when attacking Russia by leveraging Galicia and Bohemia while maintaining Greece-Trieste defensive coverage
skills.description: Push into Russia’s northern holdings by coordinating pressure on St. Petersburg and nearby seas, often with northern allies while Austria advances elsewhere. Use it when Russia is overextended or tied

skills.name: Fortify the Frontier
skills.summary: game=diplomacy | skill=Fortify the Frontier | effects=build_completed | context=use during build phase to place a defensive unit in Trieste or Budapest, securing key borders and deterring Italy, Turkey, or Russia pressure
skills.description: Use this build when Austria has an open home center after the winter adjustments to strengthen its borders. Add an army in Vienna or Trieste, or a fleet in Trieste, to cover key fronts against Italy,

skills.name: Secure Defensive Line
skills.summary: game=diplomacy | skill=Secure Defensive Line | effects=defend_completed | context=use when defending key centers, choosing safe retreats, and preserving flexible coverage against advancing neighbors without blocking home centers
skills.description: Form a tight Austrian defensive shell—typically holding Vienna/Serbia while fleets anchor Greece/Trieste—to cover home centers and key approaches. Use it when pressured by Italy, Turkey, or Russia, es

skills.name: Secure Balkan Frontier
skills.summary: game=diplomacy | skill=Secure Balkan Frontier | effects=position_completed | context=use when Austria should hold Greece and Serbia, cover Trieste, reinforce Balkans with army/fleet builds, and pressure Russia, Italy, or Turkey from Galicia/Bohemia while maintaining a defensive eastern frontier
skills.description: As Austria, secure the Balkans by taking and holding Serbia, Greece, and Albania while keeping Vienna covered and the Adriatic under control. Use this in 1901–1902 to stabilize your southern frontier

skills.name: Open Serbia Galicia
skills.summary: game=diplomacy | skill=Open Serbia Galicia | effects=setup_completed | context=Use in setup when opening toward Serbia and Galicia while diplomatically containing Italy and Russia
skills.description: Austria opens with A Bud→Ser and A Vie→Gal, usually alongside F Tri→Alb or hold, to claim Serbia while contesting Galicia immediately. Use it when you want early pressure on Russia and a strong Balkan
